name: Victor · Nguyễn Văn Thắng
title: About Me
bio1: I am a Full-stack Developer with experience building web and mobile applications across the stack — from frontend interfaces and UI/UX to backend APIs and database design. I work with React, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, and relational databases, comfortable taking ownership of features and collaborating in team environments.
bio2: Currently living in Ho Chi Minh City, I focus on turning ideas into interfaces, and interfaces into real impact, making it all more vibrant. AI, beware — I might replace you before you replace me.
pillar1_desc: Designing resilient microservices, processing real-time data flow (RabbitMQ, Socket.io), and implementing Clean Architecture.
pillar2_desc: Building containerized environments (Docker), configuring API Gateways (Kong), optimizing databases, and developing low-level system applications.
pillar3_desc: Ensuring clean and maintainable code, writing comprehensive tests, optimizing codebase structure, and automating integration workflows.
